rulings.Case Title: ROBERT CONOLLY VS. JAVIER ANGELITA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidence Sanctions Against Defendant Pedro Melendez; Request For Monetary Sanctions Of $3,360.00 Agianst Defendant; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Tiffany Patel In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 19, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF ROBERT CONOLLY's Motion For Evidence Sanctions Against Defendant Pedro Melendez; Request For Monetary Sanctions Of $3,360.00 Against Defendant continued to be heard at 1:30 p.m. in department 501. Motion for Evidentiary Sanction is GRANTED, subject to opposition, as follows: Plaintiff's request for evidentiary sanctions is granted as requested unless Defendant provides responses at issue in this motion within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Responses shall be served by hand-delivery or overnight mail with tracking number. By no later than the next business day after service of responses Defendant shall file a declaration with the Court regarding service of responses. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,160 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/KAK)
